scripts.docker:up: docker-compose up -d --force-recreate # Start containere med tvangsgenerering
scripts.docker:start: docker-compose up -d # Start containere i frakoblet modus
scripts.docker:down: docker-compose down # Stopp og fjern containere
scripts.docker:clean: docker-compose down --rmi all # Fjern containere og images (behold database)
scripts.docker:clean:postgres: docker-compose down -v --rmi all # Fjern alt inkludert database data
scripts.docker:logs: docker-compose logs -f # Vis logger fra alle containere
scripts.docker:update: git pull && docker-compose down && docker-compose build && docker-compose up -d # Hent siste kode og bygg containere
scripts.docker:rebuild: docker-compose down && docker-compose build && docker-compose up -d # Bygg containere med cache
scripts.docker:reinstall: docker-compose down && docker-compose build --no-cache && docker-compose up -d # Full gjenoppbygging uten cache
scripts.docker:cloudflared: bash -c 'if [ -f .env.local ]; then . .env.local; elif [ -f .env ]; then . .env; fi; docker run -d --name cloudflared --restart unless-stopped --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway cloudflare/cloudflared:latest tunnel run --token $CLOUDFLARE_TUNNEL_TOKEN' # Start Cloudflare tunnel for ekstern tilgang. Path: Zero Trust > Networks > Manage Tunnel > Add a Tunnel med selvvalgt Subdomain, Domain og Type: HTTP, URL: http://host.docker.internal:8001
scripts.docker:cloudflared:stop: docker stop cloudflared && docker rm cloudflared # Stopp Cloudflare tunnel container
